hero.tagline: Your cosy retreat in Cap d'Agde, steps from the sea. A genuine change of scenery with all the comforts of home.

amenities.description: Charming 2-room apartment, well-designed, south-facing throughout - perfectly cozy.
amenities.linen_note: Bed linen rental - included from 7 nights
reviews.title: Guest reviews
book.title: Book your stay
book.direct_intro: Booking direct saves you the platform service fees.
book.conditions_placeholder:
• A rental agreement will be drawn up at the time of booking and must be returned signed.
•The condominium rules must be signed and adhered to, ensuring peace and quiet and respect for all residents (no parties or late-night disturbances, etc.).
• We will require photocopies of the occupants' ID cards, their home addresses and email addresses, as well as proof of vacation insurance or liability insurance.
• Smoking is prohibited in the apartment and hallways.
• End-of-stay cleaning option: €50 (the kitchen area will be cleaned regardless of the cleaning option chosen). If the apartment is returned in a dirty state, €50 will be withheld from the deposit.
• Bed linens, towels, and house linens are available for rent (included for stays of 7 days or more).
• Essential kitchen items to get you started on your first day: salt, pepper, oil, vinegar, coffee pods and tea bags, sugar.
• Senseo coffee maker, kettle, electric grill, small oven, 2 ceramic cooktops, toaster, iron, hair dryer, washing machine.
book.direct_note: Book direct and skip the platform fees
around.title: In the area
around.subtitle: Cap d'Agde and the Hérault region are brimming with natural and cultural treasures waiting to be discovered.
around.nearby_subtitle: From the beach to the harbour, via the Saturday morning market, everything that makes Cap d'Agde so charming is just a stone's throw away whether on foot or by bike.
around.region_subtitle: From the oysters of Bouzigues to the vineyards of Languedoc, from the wild gorges of the Hérault to the medieval villages of the countryside. Plenty to choose from to create your own itinerary, all within an hour's drive of the apartment.
around.links_note: Links and practical information to be added by the owner.
